mapper.select: SELECT UNNEST(targets) as target_name, COUNT(*) as drug_count, AVG(global_highest_phase_score) as avg_phase_score, MAX(global_highest_phase) as highest_phase FROM ci_tracking_latest WHERE disease_id = #{diseaseId} GROUP BY target_name ORDER BY drug_count DESC

SELECT c.drug_id, c.drug_name_en, c.drug_name_cn, c.targets, c.disease_id, d.ta_id, d.name_en AS disease_name_en, d.name_cn AS disease_name_cn, c.moa, c.originator, c.research_institute, c.global_highest_phase, c.global_highest_phase_score, c.indication_top_global_latest_stage, c.indication_top_global_start_date, c.highest_trial_id, c.highest_trial_phase, c.nct_id, c.data_source FROM ci_tracking_latest c LEFT JOIN disease d ON d.id = c.disease_id WHERE c.disease_id = #{diseaseId}
AND c.targets && ARRAY['#{target}']
AND c.global_highest_phase = ANY(ARRAY['#{phase}'])
AND c.originator = ANY(ARRAY['#{origin}'])
ORDER BY CARDINALITY(c.targets) ASCDESC
ORDER BY c.global_highest_phase_score ASCDESC
ORDER BY c.targets[1] ASCDESC
ORDER BY c.global_highest_phase_score DESC
